zh.lifeSummary: 當Winifred Leigh於大約1538年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾斯同勒時，她的父親Sir Thomas Leigh31歲，母親Alice Barker20歲。她於1552年2月5日與Sir George Bond在英國賀特福爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1600年3月10日在英國賀特福爾金也斯 瓦爾登享年63歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特丘 馬尼亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Winifred Leigh于大约1538年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾斯同勒时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Leigh31岁，母亲Alice Barker20岁。她于1552年2月5日与Sir George Bond在英国賀特福爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1600年3月10日在英国賀特福爾金也斯 瓦爾登享年63岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特丘 馬尼亞。

nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

variants.name: Leah
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 李 and 利, see   Li   1 and 3.

variants.name: Lee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sang, Jae, Jong, Jung, Sung, Yong, Kyung, Seung, Dong, Kwang, Myung.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a meadow or a patch of arable land, Middle English lee, lea, from Old English lēa, dative case (used after a preposition) of lēah, which originally meant ‘wood or glade’.

English: habitational name from any of the many places in England named with Old English lēah ‘wood, glade’, including Lee in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Kent, and Shropshire, and Lea in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Wiltshire.

nameMeanings.name: Winifred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh female personal name Gwenfrewi . The form of the name has been altered by association with   Winfred   and has been in general use among English speakers since the 16th century.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Winifred Leigh was born about 1538, in Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Leigh, was 31 and her mother, Alice Barker, was 20. She married Sir George Bond on 5 February 1552, in Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 10 March 1600, in King's Walden, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Chew Magna, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Winifred Leigh est née environ 1538, à Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Leigh, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice Barker, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George Bond le 5 février 1552, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 mars 1600, à King's Walden, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Chew Magna, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Winifred Leigh um 1538 in Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Leigh 31 und ihre Mutter Alice Barker 20. Sie hat am 5. Februar 1552 in Hertfordshire, England Sir George Bond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. März 1600 im Alter von 63 Jahren in King's Walden, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Chew Magna, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Winifred Leigh è nata il circa 1538 nel Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas Leigh, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Alice Barker, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir George Bond il 5 febbraio 1552, nel Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 10 marzo 1600, nel King's Walden, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Chew Magna, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Winifred Leighが約1538年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストーニレイグで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Leighは31歳，母Alice Barkerは20歳であった。1552年2月5日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアでSir George Bondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1600年3月10日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアキング'ス ワルデンで63歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトチェウ マグナにて埋葬された。

ko.St Stephen Walbrook with St Benet Shereh: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 스티븐 월브룩 위스 스트 베넷 셔호그
ko.Buckland St Mary, Chard, Somersetshire,: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 벅랜드 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Winifred Leigh(이)가 대략 1538년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스톤리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Leigh(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Barker(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1552년 2월 5일 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 Sir George Bond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1600년 3월 10일 영국 허트퍼드실르 킨그'스 월든에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 체w 매그나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Winifred Leigh nasceu aproximadamente 1538, em Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Leigh, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice Barker, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir George Bond em 5 de fevereiro de 1552, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de março de 1600, em King's Walden, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Chew Magna, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Winifred Leigh родилась около 1538 г. в местности стоунелиг, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Leigh было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Barker, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George Bond 5 февраля 1552 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 10 марта 1600 г. в местности кинг'с валден, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности чю магна, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Winifred Leigh nació aproximadamente 1538, en Stoneleigh, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Leigh, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alice Barker, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir George Bond el 5 de febrero de 1552, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 10 de marzo de 1600, en King's Walden, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Chew Magna, Somerset, Inglaterra.
